calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2012 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-11-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Thomas Ray, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Asset Acceptance.
Defendant Valiant Srykhanxay present in pro per.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Judgment for plaintiff and against defendant in the amount of $5,000.00, entry of judgment stay until 08-31-12.
If defendant make a lumpsum payment of $1,500.00 to be sent to Mr. Ray's office in Walnut Creek on or before 08-07-12, plaintiff will dismissed the action with prejudice.
Parties agreed to terms on the record.
The Court deemed the matter settled and place it on the CRC Dismissal Calendar for 09-11-12 at 10 am. in Dept. 610.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Set For Trial On May-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
